summary: Classified the five open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive signal was found, and no close/merge/fix action is permitted or safe from the provided gates. Each PR needs maintainer review or author/branch follow-up rather than backlog cleanup.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft focused fix with explicit ready-for-maintainer-look signal; technical correctness and draft finalization require maintainer review.
Maintainer-owned draft focused plugin fix; not low-signal or closable, and the job requires human review for maintainer signal and technical correctness.
Contributor focused bug fix has active author follow-up, dirty merge state, and failing relevant checks; human maintainer review is required because this job cannot repair or merge it.
Focused contributor bug fix appears reviewable but requires maintainer technical correctness judgment before any merge or issue closeout.
Maintainer-owned draft focused gateway/plugin fix; not low-signal or closable, and maintainer review is the remaining decision.
